title: ilex ferruginea
intro: Ilex ferruginea, also known as the rusty-leaf holly or rusty-leaved holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ilex ferruginea include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of Ilex ferruginea may be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
